recommendations.title: Mulan
recommendations.overview: When the Emperor of China issues a decree that one man per family must serve in the Imperial Chinese Army to defend the country from Huns, Hua Mulan, the eldest daughter of an honored warrior, steps in to take the place of her ailing father. She is s

recommendations.title: The Breadwinner
recommendations.overview: A headstrong young girl in Afghanistan, ruled by the Taliban, disguises herself as a boy in order to provide for her family.

recommendations.title: Kung Fu Panda 3
recommendations.overview: While Po and his father are visiting a secret panda village, an evil spirit threatens all of China, forcing Po to form a ragtag army to fight back.

recommendations.title: Gnome Alone
recommendations.overview: When Chloe discovers that her new home's garden gnomes are not what they seem, she must decide between the pursuit of a desired high school life and taking up the fight against the Troggs.

recommendations.title: The Brave Little Toaster
recommendations.overview: A group of dated appliances, finding themselves stranded in a summer home that their family had just sold, decide to seek out their eight year old 'master'.

recommendations.title: The Lego Movie 2: The Second Part
recommendations.overview: It's been five years since everything was awesome and the citizens are facing a huge new threat: LEGO DUPLO® invaders from outer space, wrecking everything faster than they can rebuild.

recommendations.title: Abominable
recommendations.overview: A group of misfits encounter a young Yeti named Everest, and they set off to reunite the magical creature with his family on the mountain of his namesake.

recommendations.title: The Transformers: The Movie
recommendations.genres: Animation, Science Fiction, Action, Adventure, Family
recommendations.overview: The Autobots must stop a colossal planet-consuming robot who goes after the Autobot Matrix of Leadership. At the same time, they must defend themselves against an all-out attack from the Decepticons.

recommendations.title: Tarzan II
recommendations.overview: When one of his missteps puts his family in jeopardy, Tarzan decides they would be better off without him.

recommendations.title: Pocahontas
recommendations.overview: Pocahontas, daughter of a Native American tribe chief, falls in love with an English soldier as colonists invade 17th century Virginia.
